idea-plugin.name: GPT4_lll
idea-plugin.change-notes:
4.1.5 (2026-04-09)

  • UI 优化/UI Enhancement:

    • 引入 Liquid Glass 设计语言，全面重构聊天界面视觉风格：新增磨砂玻璃材质面板（GlassPanel）、玻璃质感按钮（GlassButton）、玻璃进度条（GlassProgressBar）等主题组件，支持多层渲染管线（柔和阴影 → 半透明背景 → 圆角裁剪 → 高斯模糊 → 高光反射条 → 边框描边）。
    • Introduced Liquid Glass design language with a complete visual overhaul of the chat interface: added frosted glass panel (GlassPanel), glass-style button (GlassButton), glass progress bar (GlassProgressBar) and other themed components, supporting multi-layer rendering pipeline (soft shadow → translucent background → rounded clipping → Gaussian blur → highlight reflection → border stroke).
    • 新增 LiquidGlassTheme 主题常量系统，统一管理颜色、圆角、阴影、间距等设计参数，全面适配 IntelliJ 浅色/深色模式（所有主题色使用 JBColor 封装自动切换）。
    • Added LiquidGlassTheme constant system for centralized management of colors, corner radius, shadows, spacing and other design tokens, fully adapting to IntelliJ light/dark themes (all colors wrapped with JBColor for automatic switching).
    • 新增 SpringAnimator 弹簧动画引擎，支持 Fast / Standard / Slow 三档预设，为 UI 交互提供流畅自然的动画效果。
    • Added SpringAnimator spring animation engine with Fast / Standard / Slow presets, providing smooth and natural animation effects for UI interactions.
    • 新增悬浮状态指示条（StatusIndicatorPanel）：支持运行中旋转动画、完成/错误/停止状态自动淡出，不占用对话内容布局空间。
    • Added floating status indicator (StatusIndicatorPanel): supports spinning animation during execution, auto-fade for completed/error/stopped states, without occupying conversation layout space.
    • 新增动态边框绘制器（StatusBorderPainter）：根据 Agent 运行状态显示动画边框，组件不可见时自动暂停动画以节省资源。
    • Added dynamic border painter (StatusBorderPainter): displays animated border based on Agent runtime status, automatically pausing animation when component is invisible to save resources.
    • 对话气泡区分 user / assistant 角色 tint 颜色，提升视觉辨识度。
    • Differentiated user/assistant bubble tint colors for improved visual distinction.
    • 优化阴影与高光参数：深色模式下降低阴影 alpha 避免过重，高光反射条深色模式下降低亮度避免刺眼。
    • Optimized shadow and highlight parameters: reduced shadow alpha in dark mode to avoid heaviness, lowered highlight brightness in dark mode to prevent glare.
    • 新增内容块类型：ThinkingBlock、ToolCallBlock、ToolUseBlock、ToolResultBlock、StepBlock、FileChangesBlock、MermaidBlock（流程图渲染）、ZoomableImagePanel（可缩放图片面板）。
    • Added new content block types: ThinkingBlock, ToolCallBlock, ToolUseBlock, ToolResultBlock, StepBlock, FileChangesBlock, MermaidBlock (flowchart rendering), ZoomableImagePanel (zoomable image panel).

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 修复滚动到底部时模型选择面板溢出容器边界的问题（GridBagLayout weighty 分配修正）。
    • Fixed model selection panel overflowing container boundary when scrolled to bottom (GridBagLayout weighty distribution fix).
    • 修复 Markdown 列表、引用块等结构化元素丢失缩进的问题（补充 SafeHTMLEditorKit 默认 CSS 规则）。
    • Fixed missing indentation for Markdown lists, blockquotes and other structured elements (added default CSS rules to SafeHTMLEditorKit).
    • 修复滚动到顶部时聊天内容溢出到底部输入区域的问题（布局权重归一化）。
    • Fixed chat content overflowing into bottom input area when scrolled to top (layout weight normalization).
    • 修复 macOS 窗口切换时输入框导致的 UI 冻结问题（getInputMethodRequests() 窗口失焦时返回 null，阻止 TSM/CoreText 死锁）。
    • Fixed UI freeze caused by input field during macOS window switching (getInputMethodRequests() returns null when window loses focus, preventing TSM/CoreText deadlock).
    • 新增 SafeHtmlPane 安全 HTML 渲染面板，解决 macOS 上 HTMLEditorKit 与 CoreText 原生层死锁问题。
    • Added SafeHtmlPane for safe HTML rendering, resolving HTMLEditorKit and CoreText native layer deadlock on macOS.

4.1.1 (2026-03-21)

  • ARCHITECTURE/架构重构:

    • 全面重构AI Agent架构：将原有功能模块迁移至新的架构体系，采用更清晰的分层设计，包括核心运行时(Core Runtime)、事件系统(Events)、LLM集成(LLM Integration)、规划系统(Planning)、运行时(Runtime)和状态管理(State Management)等模块。
    • Completely refactored AI Agent architecture: Migrated existing functional modules to a new architectural system with clearer layered design, including Core Runtime, Events system, LLM Integration, Planning system, Runtime, and State Management modules.
    • 重构Function Calling系统：将原有的函数调用编排器及相关协议适配器、执行引擎、记忆管理等功能迁移到新的架构中，提供了更强的扩展性和可维护性。
    • Refactored Function Calling system: Migrated the original function calling orchestrator and related protocol adapters, execution engines, memory management functions to the new architecture, providing stronger extensibility and maintainability.

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增 MCP 工具适配器：实现 MCP (Model Context Protocol) 规范的标准化适配层，支持统一的工具注册和管理机制。
    • Added MCP Tool Adapter: Implemented standardized adapter layer for MCP (Model Context Protocol) specification, supporting unified tool registration and management mechanisms.
    • 新增诊断工具(DiagnosticsTool)和打开文件工具(OpenFilesTool)：扩展了MCP工具集，提供更多IDE集成能力。
    • Added Diagnostics Tool and Open Files Tool: Extended MCP toolkit with more IDE integration capabilities.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 增强 ShellExecTool 安全性：通过多层次验证和策略引擎，强化命令执行的安全性控制，防止恶意命令执行。
    • Enhanced ShellExecTool security: Strengthened command execution security controls through multi-layered validation and policy engines to prevent malicious command execution.
    • 改进文件工具支持：增强 McpFileToolSupport 的路径安全校验，提高文件操作的安全性和可靠性。
    • Improved file tool support: Enhanced path security validation in McpFileToolSupport to improve the security and reliability of file operations.

4.0.3 (2026-03-20)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增 AgentRuntimeBridge 支持：实现 IDE 集成桥接层，支持 AI Agent 在 IDE 环境中运行，提供完整的 Agent 生命周期管理。
    • Added AgentRuntimeBridge support: Implemented IDE integration bridge layer to enable AI Agents to run in IDE environment with full lifecycle management.
    • 新增悬浮状态指示条组件：动态可视化展示 Agent 运行状态（空闲、运行中、完成、错误），提升用户操作反馈体验。
    • Added floating status indicator component: Dynamically visualize Agent runtime status (idle, running, completed, error) to enhance user feedback experience.
    • 新增 AgentPhase 枚举扩展：定义 AI Agent 执行阶段，支持 UI 状态可视化展示。
    • Extended AgentPhase enum: Defined AI Agent execution phases to support UI state visualization.
    • 新增 Token 预算分配器：实现智能 Token 分配策略，优化 Agent 对话成本控制。
    • Added Token budget allocator: Implemented intelligent Token allocation strategy to optimize Agent conversation cost control.
    • 新增 Agent 会话状态枚举：定义会话状态生命周期，支持复杂 Agent 交互场景。
    • Added Agent session state enum: Defined session state lifecycle to support complex Agent interaction scenarios.
    • 新增任务管理和持久化功能：支持 Agent 任务的状态保存和恢复，提升长时间任务处理能力。
    • Added task management and persistence: Supported Agent task state saving and restoration to improve long-term task processing capabilities.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 日志系统重构：将日志记录器从 IntelliJ 平台诊断日志切换到 Java 标准库 Logger，提高代码可移植性，减少对 IntelliJ 平台 API 的依赖。
    • Logging system refactored: Switched from IntelliJ platform diagnostic logging to Java standard library Logger, improving code portability and reducing dependency on IntelliJ platform APIs.
    • 新增工具过滤器功能：增强 Agent 工具调用的安全性，支持按需过滤和管理可用工具。
    • Added tool filter functionality: Enhanced Agent tool call security with on-demand filtering and management of available tools.

4.0.2 (2026-03-19)

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 日志系统重构：将日志记录器从 IntelliJ 平台诊断日志切换到 Java 标准库 Logger，提高代码可移植性，减少对 IntelliJ 平台 API 的依赖。
    • Logging system refactored: Switched from IntelliJ platform diagnostic logging to Java standard library Logger, improving code portability and reducing dependency on IntelliJ platform APIs.

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 修复空指针异常问题：改进日志记录实现，解决在某些条件下可能出现的空指针异常。
    • Fixed null pointer exception: Improved logging implementation to resolve potential null pointer exceptions under certain conditions.

4.0.1 (2026-03-17)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增 shell_exec 工具：AI Agent 可在项目工作区内安全地执行非交互式本地命令（如构建、测试、版本控制查询等），获取包含 stdout、stderr、退出码、执行时长和风险等级的结构化结果。
    • Added shell_exec tool: AI Agent can safely execute non-interactive local commands within the project workspace (e.g. build, test, VCS queries), receiving structured results including stdout, stderr, exit code, duration and risk classification.
    • 四层纵深安全防御：Schema 约束（argv 数组传参）→ Validator 语义校验（白名单、黑名单、元字符检测、symlink 边界校验）→ Policy 风险策略（四级风险评估 READ_ONLY / WORKSPACE_MUTATING / NETWORKED / SYSTEM_MUTATING）→ Runtime 运行时限制（超时、输出截断、进程树终止）。
    • Four-layer defense-in-depth security: Schema constraints (argv array) → Validator semantic checks (allowlist, denylist, metacharacter detection, symlink boundary validation) → Policy risk assessment (4-level: READ_ONLY / WORKSPACE_MUTATING / NETWORKED / SYSTEM_MUTATING) → Runtime limits (timeout, output truncation, process tree termination).
    • 可配置策略引擎：通过项目根目录下 .gpt4lll/shell-policy.json 自定义可执行文件白名单、命令黑名单模式、环境变量白名单、shell 模式开关和审批策略。
    • Configurable policy engine: Customize executable allowlist, deny patterns, environment variable whitelist, shell mode toggle and approval policy via .gpt4lll/shell-policy.json in project root.
    • 智能风险评估：自动识别 Git 子命令风险等级（只读/变更/危险）、构建命令、网络命令和系统破坏性命令，根据风险等级决定是否需要用户审批。
    • Smart risk assessment: Automatically classifies Git subcommand risk levels (readonly/mutating/dangerous), build commands, network commands and system-mutating commands, determining user approval requirement based on risk level.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • ExecutionEngine 更新：将 shell_exec 加入需要用户审批的敏感工具集合，确保写入/执行类工具在调用前经过用户确认。
    • ExecutionEngine updated: Added shell_exec to the approval-required tool set, ensuring write/execute tools require user confirmation before invocation.

4.0.0 (2026-03-16)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 全新 Agent 聊天界面：采用 AgentChatView 替代旧版文本区域，支持分块渲染（Markdown、代码块、思考过程、工具调用与结果），提供更流畅的流式对话体验和智能自动滚动。
    • New Agent Chat View: Replaced legacy text area with AgentChatView supporting block-based rendering (Markdown, code blocks, thinking process, tool calls & results), providing smoother streaming conversation experience with smart auto-scrolling.
    • 新增 Function Calling 编排引擎：支持多轮工具调用循环（最多20轮），自动解析、验证、执行工具调用并将结果回传 LLM，兼容 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Markdown 三种协议格式，内置降级容错机制。
    • Added Function Calling Orchestrator: Supports multi-round tool call loops (up to 20 rounds), automatically parsing, validating, executing tool calls and feeding results back to LLM, compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic and Markdown protocol formats, with built-in degradation fallback.
    • 新增统一 LLM 客户端抽象层：集中管理 HTTP 和 SSE 通信，提供流式聊天（streamChat）、同步聊天（syncChat）和原始 JSON 调用（syncChatRaw）三种模式，通过 ProviderAdapter 适配不同供应商差异。
    • Added unified LLM Client abstraction layer: Centralized HTTP and SSE communication with three modes - streaming chat (streamChat), synchronous chat (syncChat) and raw JSON call (syncChatRaw), adapting to different providers via ProviderAdapter.
    • 新增 MCP 文件写入工具（FileWriteTool）：支持四种写入模式 — 覆盖写入（overwrite）、补丁替换（patch/str_replace）、追加写入（append）和按行插入（insert_after_line），采用原子写入确保数据安全，自动保留原始换行格式。
    • Added MCP File Write Tool (FileWriteTool): Supports four write modes - overwrite, patch (str_replace), append and insert_after_line, using atomic writes for data safety with automatic line ending preservation.
    • 新增对话记忆管理系统：提供滑动窗口记忆（SlidingWindowMemory）、摘要记忆（SummarizingMemory）、自适应记忆（AdaptiveMemory）和复合记忆（CompositeMemory）多种策略，支持基于 Token 的上下文管理和 LLM 自动摘要。
    • Added Conversation Memory Management System: Provides multiple strategies including sliding window memory, summarizing memory, adaptive memory and composite memory, supporting token-based context management and LLM auto-summarization.
    • 新增运行状态可视化指示器：通过 StatusBorderPainter 动态展示任务状态（空闲、运行中动画、完成、错误），并支持 Stop 按钮在运行时显示，提升用户操作反馈体验。
    • Added Runtime Status Visual Indicator: Dynamically displays task status (idle, running animation, completed, error) via StatusBorderPainter, with Stop button shown during execution for better user feedback.
    • 新增内容块渲染系统（Content Block System）：支持 MarkdownBlock、CodeBlock、ThinkingBlock、ToolCallBlock、ToolUseBlock 和 ToolResultBlock 六种类型，StreamContentSplitter 实现流式内容的实时分块解析和渲染。
    • Added Content Block Rendering System: Supports six block types - MarkdownBlock, CodeBlock, ThinkingBlock, ToolCallBlock, ToolUseBlock and ToolResultBlock, with StreamContentSplitter for real-time streaming content parsing and rendering.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 重构 GenerateAction 核心逻辑：使用 LlmClient 替代直接 HTTP 调用，集成 RuntimeStatusManager 进行状态管理，支持 Function Calling 工作流，通过 ProgressCallback 实时展示工具调用过程。
    • Refactored GenerateAction core logic: Replaced direct HTTP calls with LlmClient, integrated RuntimeStatusManager for status management, enabled Function Calling workflow with real-time tool call display via ProgressCallback.
    • 重构工具窗口（WindowTool）：使用 AgentChatView 替代旧版组件，集成 StatusBorderPainter 状态反馈边框，支持 Function Calling 模式下的完整工具调用流程展示。
    • Refactored WindowTool: Replaced legacy components with AgentChatView, integrated StatusBorderPainter for status feedback, supporting complete tool call flow display in Function Calling mode.
    • 增强 MCP 工具注册与搜索：优化 KeywordSearchTool 和 ProjectTreeTool，增强 McpFileToolSupport 工作区路径安全校验。
    • Enhanced MCP tool registry and search: Optimized KeywordSearchTool and ProjectTreeTool, enhanced McpFileToolSupport workspace path security validation.
    • 优化 LinterFixDialog 修复对话框：改进代码对比展示和交互体验。
    • Optimized LinterFixDialog: Improved code comparison display and interaction experience.
    • 重构 ChatUtils 工具类：扩展消息构建能力，支持新的 Function Calling 消息格式。
    • Refactored ChatUtils: Extended message building capabilities with support for new Function Calling message formats.
    • 增强 Message 和 ChatContent 模型：扩展数据模型以支持工具调用、工具结果等新消息类型。
    • Enhanced Message and ChatContent models: Extended data models to support tool calls, tool results and other new message types.
    • 新增全面的单元测试和属性测试：覆盖 Function Calling 编排、协议适配、验证引擎、记忆管理、MCP 工具等核心模块，共新增超过 20 个测试类。
    • Added comprehensive unit tests and property tests: Covering Function Calling orchestration, protocol adapters, validation engine, memory management, MCP tools and other core modules, with over 20 new test classes.

3.9.2 (2025-12-24)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增 AI 智能 Linter 修复功能，根据 JetBrains IDE 的代码检查器（Linter）发现的问题，自动生成修复建议。选中有问题的代码后，右键选择"GPT4lll: Fix Linter Errors"或使用快捷键 Ctrl+Alt+L，即可获得 AI 生成的修复建议。按回车键或点击"应用修复"按钮，即可一键替换原代码。
    • Added AI-powered Linter Fix feature that automatically generates fix suggestions based on code inspection (Linter) issues detected by JetBrains IDE. Select problematic code, right-click and choose "GPT4lll: Fix Linter Errors" or use shortcut Ctrl+Alt+L to get AI-generated fix suggestions. Press Enter or click "Apply Fix" to replace the original code with one click.

3.9.1 (2025-12-23)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增智能注释翻译系统，支持对外部库文件中的注释进行实时翻译，提供流式翻译体验，显著提升代码阅读效率和学习效率。
    • Added intelligent comment translation system that provides real-time translation for comments in external library files with streaming translation experience, significantly improving code reading efficiency and study efficiency.
    • 新增可扩展文件分析框架，支持多语言文件分析服务的动态加载，当前已集成Java文件专用分析器和通用文件分析器。
    • Added extensible file analysis framework with dynamic loading support for multi-language file analysis services, currently integrated with Java-specific analyzer and generic file analyzer.
    • 新增注释翻译模式切换功能，用户可以在原文和翻译之间无缝切换，并支持翻译内容的重新生成。
    • Added translation mode switching feature that allows seamless toggling between original and translated content, with support for regenerating translations.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 更新Qwen模型系列，新增Qwen3-Coder-Plus和Qwen3-Coder-Flash模型选项，提升代码生成质量和响应速度。
    • Updated Qwen model series with new Qwen3-Coder-Plus and Qwen3-Coder-Flash options, improving code generation quality and response speed.
    • 优化供应商选择逻辑，增强项目设置的持久化能力，支持智能恢复上次使用的模型配置。
    • Enhanced provider selection logic with improved project settings persistence, supporting intelligent recovery of previously used model configurations.
    • 重构文件分析架构，采用优先级管理和服务注册机制，提升系统扩展性和维护性。
    • Refactored file analysis architecture with priority management and service registration mechanism, improving system extensibility and maintainability.
    • 增强错误处理机制，添加ProcessCanceledException支持，提升任务取消的响应性和稳定性。
    • Enhanced error handling mechanism with ProcessCanceledException support, improving task cancellation responsiveness and stability.

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 修复了代码插入稳定性问题，优化了编辑器操作的线程安全性，确保所有生成内容正确插入。
    • Fixed code insertion stability issues by optimizing thread safety of editor operations, ensuring all generated content is correctly inserted.
    • 解决了文件类型检测的准确性问题，现在能更精确地识别外部库文件和项目文件。
    • Resolved file type detection accuracy issues, now providing more precise identification of external library files and project files.

3.8.18 (2025-08-08)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 新增AI智能提交信息生成功能，基于Git变更内容自动生成符合规范的提交信息，提升版本控制效率。
    • Added AI-powered commit message generation feature that automatically creates standardized commit messages based on Git changes, improving version control efficiency.
    • 新增Git工作报告功能，支持按作者和时间范围筛选Git提交记录，并生成详细的工作报告，便于团队协作和项目管理。
    • Added Git work report feature that supports filtering Git commits by author and time range, generating detailed work reports for better team collaboration and project management.

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 修复了任务状态管理问题，确保任务完成后正确更新状态，避免任务卡死的情况。
    • Fixed task status management issues, ensuring proper status updates after task completion to prevent task hanging.
    • 解决了编辑器最后一行选中时代码插入失败的问题，现在所有生成的代码都能准确插入到指定位置。
    • Resolved the issue where code insertion failed when selecting the last line of the editor, now all generated code can be accurately inserted at the designated location.

3.8.16 (2025-04-24)

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 提升了生成回答的正确度，优化了语言模型的上下文理解能力，使其在处理复杂编程问题和逻辑推理任务时表现更加准确。
    • Enhanced the accuracy of generated responses by improving contextual understanding in the language model, leading to better performance on complex coding and logical reasoning tasks.

  • COMPATIBILITY/兼容性:

    • 新增对 IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1 版本的支持，确保插件在最新版本的 IDE 中能够稳定运行并提供完整功能。
    • Added compatibility with IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1, ensuring stable performance and full feature support in the latest IDE version.

3.8.15 (2025-03-05)

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 解决了当用户选中的内容包含编辑器最后一行时，生成的代码无法正确写入编辑器的问题。此问题已得到修正，确保所有生成的代码都能被准确无误地插入到指定位置。
    • Resolved an issue where, if the selected content included the last line of the editor, the generated code could not be correctly inserted into the editor. This problem has been addressed to ensure that all generated codes can be accurately placed at the designated location.
    • 修正了在特定情况下平台返回错误信息（如token无效或过期）未能弹出提示框的问题。现在，系统能够识别这些情况并适时向用户显示相应的错误提示，以提升用户体验。
    • Fixed an issue where under certain conditions error messages from the platform (such as invalid or expired tokens) did not trigger a popup alert. The system now properly detects these situations and displays relevant error notifications to the user, enhancing the overall user experience.

3.8.14 (2025-02-12)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 插件新增功能：适配推理模型的返回，将推理过程中的思考内容展示在对话框中。
    • Added a new feature: Adapted the inference model’s response, displaying the reasoning process in the dialog box.

  • BUG FIX/修复:

    • 修复了任务状态管理错误，任务结束后未正确更改状态的问题。
    • Fixed an issue with task status management, where the status was not updated after the task was completed.

3.8.12 (2025-02-10)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 插件新增功能：支持 DeepSeek 平台，添加 V3 和 R1 模型。
    • Added a new feature: Support for the DeepSeek platform, adding V3 and R1 models.

3.8.12 (2025-02-10)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 插件新增功能：支持 DeepSeek 平台，添加 V3 和 R1 模型。
    • Added a new feature: Support for the DeepSeek platform, adding V3 and R1 models.

3.8.11 (2024-12-19)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 插件新增功能：在 IDEA 右侧的文件列表中选中需要评估的代码文件或文件夹，选择 GPT4lll:Score Files，即可生成所有文件的评估内容。
    • Added a new feature: Select the desired code files or folders in the file list on the right side of IDEA, choose GPT4lll:Score Files, and generate evaluation content for all selected files.

3.8.10 (2024-12-2)

  • 修复/FIX:

    • 修复了由于个别AIGC平台返回格式导致的错误。
    • Fixed errors caused by the return format from certain AIGC platforms.

3.8.9 (2024-11-29)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 完全适配idea 2024.3，提高兼容性和使用体验。
    • Fully adapted to idea 2024.3, enhancing compatibility and user experience.

3.8.8 (2024-11-29)

  • FEATURE/新功能:

    • 完全适配X的Grok，提高兼容性和使用体验。
    • Fully adapted to X's Grok, enhancing compatibility and user experience.

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 新增支持阿里coder-plus模型，为开发者提供更强大的代码辅助功能。
    • Added support for Alibaba's coder-plus model, providing developers with more powerful code assistance features.

3.8.5 (2024-10-29)

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 多项目同时开启时，历史记录列表展示逻辑优化：将出现在当前试用的项目中。
    • When multiple projects are opened simultaneously, the logic for displaying the history list is optimized: it will appear in the currently selected project.

3.8.4 (2024-10-24)

  • IMPROVEMENT/优化:

    • 多项目同时开启时，聊天内容可以分开，这样更符合使用场景
    • When multiple projects are opened at the same time, the chat content can be separated, which is more suitable for the usage scenario

3.8.3 (2024-10-17)

  • 修复/FIX:

    • 修复多窗口情况下，模型选择下拉栏混乱的问题
    • Fixed the issue of model selection drop-down list being confusing in multi-window mode.

3.8.2 (2024-10-16)

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 插件支持2024.2系列的IntelliJ IDEA
    • The plugin supports the IntelliJ IDEA 2024.2 series.

3.8.1 (2024-10-11)

  • 修复/Fix:

    • 修复：免费模型对应的对话方式未经特殊处理导致无法使用的问题。
    • Fix: Resolved the issue where the conversation mode for the free model was not properly handled, causing it to be unusable.

3.8.0 (2024-10-11)

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 界面重构：由于模型种类增多，现根据厂商分类，用户可选择想要的模型。
    • Interface redesign: As the number of models grows, models are now categorized by vendor for easier selection.
    • 通义千问：添加了更多模型选择，提升用户体验。
    • Qwen: Added more model options for improved user experience.
    • 新增自定义API配置：用户可填写API地址、API key及模型名称，轻松集成。目前支持OpenAI标准接口。
    • New custom API configuration: Users can now input API address, API key, and model name for easy integration. Currently supports OpenAI API standards.

  • 优化/Optimization:

    • 配置界面优化：将OpenAI、文心一言和通义千问的配置分开，简化切换模型的操作。
    • Configuration interface improved: Separated configurations for OpenAI, Baidu ERNIE, and Qwen, simplifying the model-switching process.
    • 文心一言配置方式优化：现在只需填写API key和Secret，无需填写API地址。
    • Optimized Baidu ERNIE configuration: Now only API key and Secret are required, API address is no longer needed.

3.7.5 (2024-08-26)

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 增加了对阿里云AIGC平台“通义千问”的支持。
    • Added support for Alibaba Cloud's AIGC platform "Qwen".

  • 问题修复/Bug Fix:

    • 修复了由于百度格式问题导致的回复内容无限循环的问题。
    • Fixed the issue of infinite looping responses due to Baidu format problems.

3.7.3 (2024-06-20)

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 内容展示框现在将 MD 解析为 HTML，并兼容 2024.1 以后的版本。
    • The content display box now parses MD into HTML and is compatible with versions 2024.1 and later.

3.7.2 (2024-06-19)

  • 界面优化/UI Improvement:

    • 我们对聊天工具窗口内容进行了重构，使其更加美观，并能够显示 HTML 内容，例如代码块、图片等。
    • We have refactored the chat tool window content to make it more aesthetically pleasing and capable of displaying HTML content, such as code blocks and images.

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 内容展示框现在将 MD 解析为 HTML。
    • The content display box now parses MD into HTML.

  • 问题修复/Bug Fix:

    • 修复了当用户输入文本后，再次失去焦点时，如果输入的文本为空，则获取内容时为占位符的问题。
    • Fixed the issue where the placeholder was retrieved if the input text was empty after the user lost focus.

3.7.0 (2024-06-18)

  • 界面优化/UI Improvement:

    • 我们对用户界面进行了全面调整，使其更加直观和现代，提升用户体验。
    • We have comprehensively adjusted the user interface to make it more intuitive and modern, enhancing the user experience.

  • 新功能/New Feature:

    • 添加了多行输入框，并支持输入框placeholder提示，让用户更便捷地输入和编辑文本。
    • Added a multi-line input box with placeholder support for easier text input and editing.
    • 引入了新建会话功能，使插件能够像web客户端一样，只需配置自己的API信息，即可流畅地与GPT进行对话，从而节省每月web端的月费。
    • Introduced a new conversation creation feature that allows the plugin to function like a web client, enabling smooth conversations with GPT by simply configuring your own API information, thus saving monthly web client fees.

  • 问题修复/Bug Fix:

    • 修复了多轮对话终止的判断条件，确保对话可以在正确的时候停止，避免不必要的资源浪费。
    • Fixed the termination condition for multi-round conversations, ensuring that conversations can stop at the right time to avoid unnecessary resource wastage.

3.6.0 (2024-05-28)

  • 免费！免费！为了提供更好的用户体验，我们新增了免费的模型供用户使用。新用户可以通过免费模型体验插件的功能，老用户则可以通过使用免费的模型来节省自己的API和科学梯子资源。
  • FREE!FREE! To provide a better user experience, we have added a free model for users to use. New users can experience the plugin's functionality through the free model, while existing users can save their API and proxy resources by using the free model.

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • Added a free model for users. This allows new users to experience the full functionality of the plugin without any initial cost, and helps existing users save on their API usage and proxy resources.
      • 新增了免费的模型供用户使用。这使得新用户可以在没有任何初始费用的情况下体验插件的全部功能，并帮助老用户节省API使用和科学梯子资源。

    • BUG FIX/问题修复：

      • Resolved an issue where conversations could not proceed due to incorrect time format. This fix ensures that all conversations can continue smoothly without interruption.
      • 修复了由于时间格式导致无法进行对话的问题。此修复确保所有对话可以顺利进行而不中断。

    3.2.0 (2024-04-07)

  • 近期openai对国内（中国）的api账号进行了大量封号处理，重新开一个用不了3天就会封号。故只能拥抱国内大模型--文心一言和同义千问，希望国内大模型可以蓬勃发展。
  • Recently, OpenAI has banned a large number of API accounts in China. A newly created account would be banned within three days. Therefore, we have to embrace the domestic large model -- ERNIE Bot and TongYi, hoping that it can flourish.

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • Full Compatibility with Baidu's ERNIE Bot. The latest version now seamlessly integrates with Baidu's ERNIE Bot, enabling users to leverage the power of this advanced AI platform for enhanced functionality and seamless experience.
      • 全面适配百度文心一言。最新版本已无缝集成百度文心一言，使用户能够利用这一先进AI平台的力量，增强功能并享受无缝体验。

    • BUG FIX/问题修复：

      • Resolved an issue where generated code was incomplete in certain cases. This update ensures that all code generated is complete and accurate, improving the overall reliability and usability of the system.
      • 修复了个别情况下生成的代码不完整的问题。此次更新确保所有生成的代码完整且准确，提高了系统的整体可靠性和可用性。

    3.0.2 (2024-01-31)

    • FIX/修复：

      • 去掉无用依赖
      • remove useless depends

    3.0.1 (2024-01-31)

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • Introduced the One-Click Unit Test Generation feature. This new feature automatically generates executable unit test files from selected code blocks, eliminating the need for manual copying and pasting. This enhancement streamlines the testing process, boosting efficiency and simplicity in code testing.
      • 推出一键生成单元测试功能。这个新功能能够从选定的代码块自动生成可执行的单元测试文件，省去了手动复制和粘贴的步骤。这一增强功能简化了测试过程，提高了代码测试的效率和简便性。
      • Added a Multi-Dialogue Mechanism for improved content generation. This mechanism allows for more in-depth conversations, enabling our AIGC (Artificial Intelligence Generated Content) system to produce more accurate and refined content based on user interactions.
      • 添加了多重对话机制，用于改进内容生成。该机制允许更深入的对话交流，使我们的AIGC（人工智能生成内容）系统能够基于用户互动产生更准确、更精细的内容。

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Enhanced the interaction experience with the AIGC system, ensuring smoother and more efficient communication, leading to better understanding and more precise content results.
      • 加强了与AIGC系统的互动体验，确保交流更加流畅和高效，从而更好地理解用户需求，生成更准确的内容结果。

    2.12.2 (2023-11-17)

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • Upgraded to the latest GPT-4 Turbo model released by OpenAI on November 6, 2023. This update significantly enhances code generation capabilities, ensuring compatibility with the cutting-edge language modeling advancements for improved code accuracy and execution.
      • 升级至OpenAI于2023年11月6日发布的最新GPT-4 Turbo模型。此更新大幅增强了代码生成能力，确保插件与最新的语言建模技术兼容，提高了代码准确性和执行性能。
      • Extended compatibility for Idea Community version users, introducing adaptation logic for various code languages. This enhancement enables the plugin to recognize and adapt to different code languages seamlessly.
      • 面向Idea Community版本的用户，增加了对其他代码语言的适配逻辑，使插件能够更好地识别和适应不同的代码语言。
      • Strengthened code assessment capabilities, ensuring stability and reliability in the scoring functionality.
      • 加强了代码评估的能力，确保评分功能的稳定性和可靠性。

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Implemented backend and frontend adjustments for code assessment, enhancing stability and performance in both areas.
      • 为代码评估进行了前后端调整，提升了稳定性和性能。

    2.11.0 (2023-11-13)

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Enhanced Java Code Recognition: We've specifically focused on Java language this time, further enhancing the code recognition capabilities. This improvement aims to increase the accuracy of generated code, ensuring more precise and relevant responses for Java development scenarios.
      • 针对Java的代码识别能力提升: 在这次更新中，我们特别关注了Java语言，进一步提高了其代码识别能力。此次改进旨在提高生成代码的准确度，确保在Java开发场景中获得更精准、相关的响应。

    2.10.2 (2023-10-18)

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Code Recognition Enhancement: In various application scenarios, we have further improved code recognition capabilities to ensure users receive the most accurate answers.
      • 代码识别优化: 在各种应用场景中，我们进一步提高了代码的识别能力，确保用户能够获得更为精确的答案。
      • Response Quality Upgrade: For all application scenarios, we've refined the responses from ChatGPT, reducing and filtering out irrelevant or ineffective statements to ensure high-quality and practical content in replies.
      • 回复内容升级：针对所有应用场景，我们对ChatGPT的响应进行了筛选，减少并滤除了不相关或无效的语句，以保证回复内容的高质量与实用性。

    2.10.0 (2023-09-28)

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • For the comment generation feature; now adapts to user's naming conventions, ensuring that comments align with expectations even when naming isn't standardized.
      • 生成注释的功能：现在可以适应用户的命名习惯，确保即使在命名不规范的情况下，生成的注释内容与预期一致。
      • Upgraded the todo feature; the generated methods now utilize existing methods from related functionalities, preventing repetitive generation of similar methods.
      • todo功能升级：生成的方法现在会使用当前相关功能已有的方法，避免多次生成功能相同的方法。

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Optimized internal algorithms for more efficient comment and method generation.
      • 优化内部算法，使注释和方法生成更加高效。

    2.9.4 (2023-09-14)

    • FEATURE/功能：

      • For Java; Greatly enhanced the ability to generate code based on todo. The accuracy of the returned code has been significantly increased, and its executability has been qualitatively improved.
      • 针对Java，极大提高了根据todo生成代码的能力，返回的代码准确度大幅增加，同时可执行度有质的提升。
      • Improved the quality of comments in the code commenting feature.
      • 代码注释功能的注释质量提高。

    • IMPROVEMENT/优化：

      • Refactored the code for increased stability, now supports opening multiple IDEs.
      • 重构代码，稳定性提高，目前已支持开启多个ide。
      • Slightly improved the stability of code assessment.
      • 小幅度提升代码评估的稳定性。

    2.9.3 (2023-09-13)

    • FIX/修复：

      • Fixed the issue where the plugin failed to recognize the language model selection when manually entering chat content.
      • 修复了插件在直接手动输入聊天内容时，选择语言模型无效的问题。

    2.9.2 (2023-09-05)

    • New Features/新功能：

      • Added a feature that allows you to auto-generate code based on the selected TODO descriptions. By highlighting the TODO comment, the plugin can generate code snippets to potentially fulfill the described task. 添加了一个功能，可以根据选中的TODO描述自动生成代码。只需高亮显示TODO注释，插件就可以生成代码片段，可能完成描述的任务。

    2.9.0 (2023-08-06)

    • New Features/新功能：

      • Added a feature that allows you to auto-generate code comments using ChatGPT. By simply highlighting the code, the plugin will call on the ChatGPT AI model to generate comprehensive and contextually appropriate code comments. 添加了使用ChatGPT自动生成代码注释的功能。只需简单地圈选代码，插件就会调用ChatGPT AI模型生成全面且符合上下文的代码注释。
      • Introduced an AI-assisted development mode. This feature enables developers to get on-the-fly code suggestions, increasing coding efficiency. 引入了AI辅助开发模式，开发者可以得到实时的代码建议，提高编码效率。

    • Optimizations/优化：

      • Enhanced the stability of the plugin during continuous coding sessions. 提高了连续编码会话中插件的稳定性。

    2.8.6 (2023-06-22)

    • New Features/新功能：

      • Added a Code Evaluation feature to allow team leaders to control the quality of the code. 添加了代码评估功能，方便团队领导来把控代码质量。

    • Optimizations/优化：

      • Optimized the dialogue box to follow input and prevent erratic jumping. 优化了对话框跟随输入，避免乱跳。
      • Improved natural language recognition logic for enhanced accuracy and performance. 自然语言识别逻辑已经优化，现在识别准确度和性能得到提升。

    • Bug Fixes/Bug修复：

      • Fixed the issue where pop-ups for new users failed to appear. 修复了新用户弹窗弹出失败的问题。

    2.5.2 (2023-06-14)

    • 新功能：

      • 添加历史记录功能，方便用户查看之前的对话和操作记录。[Added history recording feature for users to view previous conversations and actions.]
      • 界面添加英语提示，使插件更加友好，方便外国友人使用。[Added English prompts to the interface for improved usability and foreign user-friendliness.]

    • 优化：

      • 自然语言识别逻辑已经优化，现在识别准确度和性能得到提升。[Improved natural language recognition logic for enhanced accuracy and performance.]
      • 代码输入逻辑经过优化，解决了代码输入不完整的问题，提供更流畅的代码补全体验。[Optimized code input logic to address incomplete code input and provide smoother code autocompletion experience.]

    • Bug修复：

      • 修复了对话框未清空的问题，现在每次新的对话都会自动清空对话框，方便用户进行新的输入。[Fixed the issue where the dialogue box was not cleared, now it gets automatically cleared for each new conversation, allowing convenient input.]

    2.0.1 (2023-06-09)

    • 自然语言识别

      我们知道，在阅读代码或者尝试理解一个新的函数或模块时，不同的人可能使用不同的语言或术语。因此，我们的插件现在可以自动识别用户的自然语言，并将返回的注释和解释设为用户的常用语言。这意味着不论您是使用中文，英文，法文还是其他任何语言，我们的插件都可以为您提供便利。这使得在多语言团队中的合作变得更加无缝，并且能更好地理解和学习新的代码。

    • 按需生成代码

      在此次重大更新中，我们的插件现在可以根据您的需求生成代码。只需简单地描述您需要什么，插件就会为您生成对应的代码。无论您是需要一个新的函数，一个数据库查询，或是一段复杂的逻辑，我们的插件都能帮助您快速地生成代码，大大提高了您的工作效率。

    • 自动识别代码类型

      我们的插件现在可以自动识别您正在处理的代码类型，无论是 Kotlin（Kt），Java，Go，还是 SQL。这意味着您无需花费额外的时间去配置或切换不同的工具或模式。我们的插件会根据您的代码智能地适应并提供相应的支持。

    1.0.6 (2023-06-07)

    • 添加私有化的gpt的支持。出于代码安全，很多公司选择自建gpt服务，避免关键代码泄漏
    • 优化：选中代码，交由gpt优化后，自动打开gpt对话框
    • 添加支持gpt-3.5-turbo

    1.0.5 (2023-06-05)

    • 布局更换为JEditorPane
    • 添加支持MD语法的展示框
idea-plugin.description:
Features

Agent Chat View with Block Rendering

A completely redesigned chat interface with block-based content rendering. Supports six content block types: Markdown, Code, Thinking Process, Tool Call, Tool Use, and Tool Result. Provides smooth streaming display with smart auto-scrolling and per-turn bubble layout for both user and assistant messages.

Function Calling (Tool Use) Engine

Built-in Function Calling orchestrator enabling AI models to invoke tools within the IDE. Supports multi-round tool call loops (up to 20 rounds), automatic parameter validation, execution with user approval, and result feedback. Compatible with OpenAI, Anthropic and Markdown protocol formats, with built-in degradation fallback mechanism for reliability.

MCP Tool System

Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool system providing five built-in tools for AI Agent autonomous operation:

  • read_file — Read file content with optional line range
  • write_file — Write files with four modes: overwrite, patch (str_replace), append and insert_after_line, using atomic writes for data safety
  • grep — Keyword search with context lines, file size limits, directory blacklist and binary file filtering
  • tree — Project directory tree with configurable ignore patterns
  • shell_exec — Execute non-interactive local commands with 4-layer security (schema → validator → policy → runtime), structured output including stdout/stderr/exit code/risk level, configurable via .gpt4lll/shell-policy.json

All tools are sandboxed to the project workspace for security.

Unified LLM Client

Centralized LLM client abstraction layer handling HTTP and SSE communication with multiple providers. Supports streaming chat, synchronous chat, and raw JSON mode for function calling. Provider-specific differences (URL, API key format, message structure, SSE parsing) are handled transparently via adapter pattern.

Conversation Memory Management

Intelligent conversation memory system with multiple strategies: sliding window (token-based truncation), summarizing (LLM auto-summarization when context exceeds threshold), adaptive (similarity-based), and composite (multi-tier). Includes real token usage tracking from API responses.

Runtime Status Indicator

Visual status feedback via animated border: idle (no border), running (animated green sweep), completed (solid green), error (red). A Stop button appears during execution for task cancellation. Status automatically resets after 3 seconds.

Free AIGC Access

The AIGC capability is now freely available to all users. Enjoy intelligent generation services at no extra cost. However, due to high demand, you may need to queue each time you use this feature.

Multi-Platform Support

The plugin supports multiple AI platforms with unified interface and seamless provider switching.

Supported List
  • OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4o, etc.)
  • Grok
  • Tongyi Qianwen (Qwen3-Coder-Plus, Qwen3-Coder-Flash, etc.)
  • Baidu ERNIE Bot
  • DeepSeek (V3, R1)
  • OpenAI-standard custom API

Code Generation Based on TODO

Introduced the ability to generate code based on TODO comments within a project. This feature enables rapid development by transforming actionable TODOs into functional code segments.

Natural Language Recognition

Improved the logic for natural language recognition, enhancing accuracy and performance. The plugin supports over 100 languages and automatically detects the user's system language to provide responses in their preferred language.

Automatic Code Type Recognition

Enhanced the code type recognition feature to automatically identify code types.

Generate Code On Demand

Implemented the capability to generate code on demand, providing code snippets when needed.

Automatic Code Comments Generation

Added a feature that allows you to auto-generate code comments using AI. By simply highlighting the code, the plugin will call on the AI model to generate comprehensive and contextually appropriate code comments.

Intelligent Comment Translation

Real-time translation for comments in external library files with streaming translation experience. Supports seamless toggling between original and translated content, with regeneration support. Significantly improves code reading and study efficiency.

History Recording Feature

Added a history recording feature to prevent data loss. Every conversation will now be recorded, allowing easy access to previous interactions.

Code Assessment

Code Assessment feature allowing team leaders to evaluate team members' code. Facilitates code reviews, improves code quality, and fosters continuous learning within the team.

Unit Test Generation

One-click unit test generation feature that automatically creates executable unit test files from selected code blocks.

SQL Statement Evaluation and Optimization

Comprehensive SQL statement evaluation and optimization feature that provides syntax correctness checks, performance optimization suggestions, security assessments, index usage recommendations, query efficiency analysis, and best practice suggestions.

AI-Powered Commit Message Generation

Automatically generates standardized commit messages based on Git changes using AI technology.

Git Work Report Generation

Generate detailed work reports by filtering Git commits by author and time range for team collaboration and project management.

Batch File Assessment

Evaluate multiple code files or folders simultaneously by selecting them in the project file list.

AI-Powered Linter Fix

Intelligent code fix suggestions based on JetBrains IDE Linter errors. Select problematic code, right-click and choose "GPT4lll: Fix Linter Errors" or use shortcut Ctrl+Alt+L to get AI-generated fix suggestions. A side-by-side comparison dialog shows original and fixed code. Press Enter to apply the fix instantly.


GPT4_lll is a plugin designed for IntelliJ IDEA users, providing real-time code querying, analysis and AI-assisted development services. With the new Function Calling engine, the plugin can now autonomously use tools to read, search and modify project files, making it a powerful AI coding assistant within your IDE.


GPT4_lll plugin is a clean plugin with no potential risks or security issues. We warmly welcome aspiring individuals to join our development team and collaborate on enhancing this plugin.

Help

Installation Guide

  1. Open IntelliJ IDEA's settings by navigating to "File" > "Settings".
  2. Open the "Other Settings" category.
  3. Find and select "GPT4_lll Settings".
  4. Enter your API key and proxy settings (if required).

If you need any assistance or have any questions, please feel free to contact me:

  • Email: 892821031@qq.com
  • GitHub: https://github.com/lukenc/GPT4_lll
  • Issues: https://github.com/lukenc/GPT4_lll/issues

特性

Agent 聊天界面（分块渲染）

全新设计的聊天界面，支持六种内容块类型的分块渲染：Markdown、代码块、思考过程、工具调用、工具使用和工具结果。提供流畅的流式显示效果，智能自动滚动，按对话轮次分气泡展示用户和助手消息。

Function Calling（工具调用）引擎

内置 Function Calling 编排引擎，使 AI 模型能够在 IDE 中自主调用工具。支持多轮工具调用循环（最多20轮），自动参数验证、用户审批执行和结果反馈。兼容 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Markdown 三种协议格式，内置降级容错机制。

MCP 工具系统

Model Context Protocol（MCP）工具系统，提供五个内置工具供 AI Agent 自主操作：

  • read_file — 文件读取，支持行范围指定
  • write_file — 文件写入，支持覆盖写入、补丁替换（str_replace）、追加写入和按行插入四种模式，原子写入确保数据安全
  • grep — 关键词搜索，支持上下文行数、文件大小限制、目录黑名单和二进制文件过滤
  • tree — 项目目录树，支持自定义忽略目录
  • shell_exec — 本地命令执行，四层安全防御（Schema → Validator → Policy → Runtime），结构化输出包含 stdout/stderr/退出码/风险等级，通过 .gpt4lll/shell-policy.json 配置策略

所有工具均沙箱化限制在项目工作区内，确保安全。

统一 LLM 客户端

集中管理与多个供应商的 HTTP 和 SSE 通信的 LLM 客户端抽象层。支持流式聊天、同步聊天和原始 JSON 三种模式。通过适配器模式透明处理供应商差异（URL、API Key 格式、消息结构、SSE 解析）。

对话记忆管理

智能对话记忆系统，提供多种策略：滑动窗口记忆（基于 Token 截断）、摘要记忆（超出阈值时 LLM 自动摘要）、自适应记忆（基于相似度）和复合记忆（多层级）。包含 API 返回的真实 Token 用量追踪。

运行状态可视化

通过动画边框展示任务状态：空闲（无边框）、运行中（绿色扫光动画）、完成（绿色实线）、错误（红色）。执行时显示 Stop 按钮支持任务取消，状态3秒后自动复位。

免费使用AIGC

AIGC能力现已向所有用户免费开放。无需额外费用，即可享受智能化的生成服务。但由于使用人数过多，每次使用此功能时可能需要排队等待。

多平台支持

插件支持多个 AI 平台，提供统一接口和无缝切换。

支持列表
  • OpenAI (GPT-4, GPT-4o 等)
  • Grok
  • 通义千问 (Qwen3-Coder-Plus, Qwen3-Coder-Flash 等)
  • 百度文心一言
  • 深度求索 (V3, R1)
  • OpenAI 标准的自定义接口

根据TODO生成代码

在项目中根据TODO评论生成代码，通过将可操作的TODO转化为功能性代码段实现快速开发。

自然语言识别

支持100多种语言，自动检测用户系统语言，以用户偏好的语言提供回复。

自动识别代码类型

自动识别代码类型，无需手动配置。

按需生成代码

根据需要生成代码片段。

自动生成代码注释

只需圈选代码，插件即可调用 AI 模型生成全面且符合上下文的代码注释。

智能注释翻译

对外部库文件中的注释进行实时流式翻译，支持在原文和翻译之间无缝切换，并可重新生成翻译内容，显著提升代码阅读和学习效率。

历史记录功能

增加了历史记录功能，防止数据丢失。每次对话都会被记录，方便查看之前的交互记录。

代码评估

代码评估功能，允许团队领导评估团队成员的代码，促进代码审查和持续学习。

单元测试生成

一键生成单元测试功能，从选定代码块自动生成可执行的单元测试文件。

SQL语句评估和优化

全面的SQL语句评估和优化功能，提供语法检查、性能优化建议、安全性评估、索引使用建议、查询效率分析和最佳实践建议。

AI智能提交信息生成

基于Git变更内容使用AI技术自动生成符合规范的提交信息。

Git工作报告生成

通过按作者和时间范围筛选Git提交记录来生成详细的工作报告，支持团队协作和项目管理。

批量文件评估

在项目文件列表中选择多个代码文件或文件夹同时评估。

AI 智能 Linter 修复

基于 JetBrains IDE Linter 错误的智能代码修复建议。选中有问题的代码，右键选择"GPT4lll: Fix Linter Errors"或使用快捷键 Ctrl+Alt+L 获取 AI 生成的修复建议。并排对比对话框显示原始代码和修复后的代码，按回车键即可立即应用修复。


GPT4_lll 是为 IntelliJ IDEA 用户设计的插件，提供实时的代码查询、分析和 AI 辅助开发服务。通过全新的 Function Calling 引擎，插件现在可以自主使用工具读取、搜索和修改项目文件，成为 IDE 内的强大 AI 编程助手。


GPT4_lll 插件是一个干净的插件，没有潜在的风险或安全问题。我们热烈欢迎有抱负的人加入我们的开发团队，共同改进这个插件。

帮助

安装指南

  1. Open IntelliJ IDEA's settings by navigating to "File" > "Settings".
  2. Open the "Other Settings" category.
  3. Find and select "GPT4_lll Settings".
  4. Enter your API key and proxy settings (if required).

如果您需要任何帮助或有任何问题，请随时与我联系：

  • 电子邮件: 892821031@qq.com
  • GitHub: https://github.com/lukenc/GPT4_lll
  • Issues: https://github.com/lukenc/GPT4_lll/issues

action.description: Score files and create score files
Fetch Git commits filtered by author(s)
Use AI to generate commit message based on changes
Translate comments in external library files
Regenerate comment translations and update cache
Use AI to fix linter errors in selected code
